title: LPC-Associate
bio: Thomas Stapp is a LPC-Associate practicing under the supervision of Dr. Sarah Norwood (LPC-Supervisor) and our senior clinicians at Riaz Counseling, serving clients from our Galleria office. Thomas's primary areas of focus include Depression, Anxiety, and Self-Esteem Issues. Thomas draws on evidence-based approaches such as Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT), Adlerian Therapy, and Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), and offers group therapy alongside individual sessions. Thomas works with teens (13–19), adults (ages 20–64), and elderly clients (65+).
